leafwriter.Annotations that overlap will be created: Annotations that overlap will be created in RDF only, with no equivalent XML tags
leafwriter.Applying this schema change will cause a: Applying this schema change will cause a document loading error
leafwriter.Confirmation dialog preferences have bee: Confirmation dialog preferences have been reset
leafwriter.It can produce unexpected results or mak: It can produce unexpected results or make LEAF-Writer crash.
leafwriter.LEAF-Writer cannot guarantee that the do: LEAF-Writer cannot guarantee that the document will work correctly with the selected schema
leafwriter.Must be a valid HTTP URL: Must be a valid HTTP URL
leafwriter.Only RDF will be created for entities th: Only RDF will be created for entities that overlap existing XML structures
leafwriter.Only XML tags No RDF Semantic Web annota: Only XML tags. No RDF/Semantic Web annotations will be created.
leafwriter.Settings preferences have been reset to: Settings preferences have been reset to default
leafwriter.Some features are not fully implemented: Some features are not fully implemented.
leafwriter.Tagging might not work as expected: Tagging might not work as expected
leafwriter.Text Nodes must be displayed for better: Text Nodes must be displayed for better accuracy
leafwriter.The current document is using this schem: The current document is using this schema
leafwriter.The current documents root element does: The current document's root element does not match the root elements required by the selected schema
leafwriter.The existing RDF annotations will be dis: The existing RDF annotations will be discarded and no RDF will be created when tagging entities
leafwriter.The root element of the schema could not: The root element of the schema could not be determined and so it will not be used
leafwriter.XML tags and RDF - Semantic Web annotati: XML tags and RDF - Semantic Web annotations equivalent to the XML tags will be created consistent with the hierarchy of the XML schema so annotations will not be allowed to overlap
leafwriter.You can change the editor mode anytime i: You can change the editor mode anytime in the status bar (bottom left)
leafwriter.You have overlapping entities and are at: You have overlapping entities and are attemping to switch to a mode which prohibits them. The overlapping entities will be discarded if you continue
leafwriter.You must provide a username to make requ: You must provide a username to make requests

messages.LEAF-Writer could not find the document: LEAF-Writer could not find the document schema declaration.

messages.root element invalid: <1>LEAF-Writer cannot open this document.</1> Root element <2>{{rootName}}</2> not suported.
